news.headline: Ferrari completes 4th tranche of 2 billion Euro share buyback program, announces 5th tranche. Euro 350 million spent.
news.summary: On June 28, 2024, in Maranello, Italy, Ferrari N.V. disclosed that it has acquired common shares worth Euro 350 million as part of its share buyback program. This buyback is the fourth tranche of a larger program totaling approximately Euro 2 billion, slated to be completed by 2026 as outlined during the 2022 Capital Markets Day. The purchased shares are being reported daily on the Euronext Milan (EXM) and the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE). This initiative aims to enhance shareholder value and demonstrate the company's fiscal strength.

news.headline: Cingulate Inc. announces exercise of warrants for $1.86M gross proceeds through stock offerings, with about 3,187,500 shares involved.
news.summary: On June 28, 2024, in Kansas City, Kansas, Cingulate Inc. (NASDAQ: CING), a biopharmaceutical company, disclosed that it has finalized agreements for the immediate exercise of specific Series A warrants for the purchase of up to 2,125,000 common stock shares and Series B warrants for up to 1,062,500 common stock shares. Originally released in February 2023 with an exercise price of $2.00 per share, the warrants will now be exercised at a reduced price of $0.585 per share. These shares are part of the Company's pipeline of pharmaceutical products and are registered under an effective registration statement on Form S-1 (No. 333-276502). The closing of this offering is expected around July 1, 2024, pending standard closing conditions.

news.headline: Paubox introduces attachment support for HIPAA compliant texting, allowing healthcare providers to securely send files.
news.summary: A company based in San Francisco, Paubox, known for its HIPAA compliant email and texting services, has introduced a major update to Paubox Texting. This enhancement enables users to send attachments through the platform. Healthcare professionals can now securely share documents, images, and various files in their text communications, ensuring adherence to stringent HIPAA compliance regulations. This new feature in Paubox Texting empowers healthcare providers to send crucial information securely, further bolstering their ability to communicate effectively.

news.headline: Bitdeer Technologies (NASDAQ:BTDR) secures lease for 570 MW capacity, increasing total to 2.5 GW, boosting Bitcoin mining capabilities.
news.summary: Bitdeer Technologies Group (NASDAQ:BTDR) saw an increase in shares trading on Friday following the announcement of a lease agreement with the Monroe County Port Authority (MCPA). The agreement secures up to 570 MW of additional power capacity for Bitdeer. The lease, spanning 30 years, grants them access to land at the Hannibal Industrial Park in Clarington, Ohio, owned by the MCPA. This site offers advantages such as existing power infrastructure, utility switchyards, and transmission capabilities suitable for supporting hyperscale loads. With this new agreement, Bitdeer's total capacity rises to 2.5 GW globally, enhancing the company's infrastructure development for Bitcoin mining, high-performance computing (HPC), and AI. This move signals a significant progression for Bitdeer in expanding its operations and strengthening its position in the industry.

news.headline: Tucows appoints Ivan Ivanov new CFO, taking over from Dave Singh, effective from August 5, 2024.
news.summary: On June 28, 2024, Tucows Inc., a prominent global internet services company listed on NASDAQ under the symbol TCX and on TSX under TC, disclosed the appointment of Ivan Ivanov as their incoming Chief Financial Officer (CFO). Ivanov is set to take over the position from Dave Singh starting August 5, 2024. Singh, a longstanding member of Tucows, has served in the role prior to the transition.

news.headline: Fed inflation rate rose at slowest pace this year, sparking rate-cut hopes; S&P 500 futures rose.
news.summary: The latest Federal Reserve inflation rate showed the smallest increase so far this year, sparking hopes of a potential rate cut. As a result, S&P 500 futures saw an increase as investors considered the implications of this development. This news suggests a positive outlook for the market as traders anticipate changes in interest rates.

news.headline: Andronaco Industries acquires Diamond Fiberglass Systems, enhancing its fluid management capabilities in flow control.
news.summary: In Victoria, Texas on June 28, 2024, Andronaco Industries, a top supplier of corrosion-resistant flow control products, has successfully taken over Diamond Companies - Diamond Fiberglass. This acquisition marks a significant move as Diamond Fiberglass is recognized for its high-quality fluid management vessels.

news.headline: Adthena introduces Ask Arlo, a real-time AI data analysis tool for marketers. Revolutionizing search insights.
news.summary: In London on June 28, 2024, Adthena, a prominent provider of search intelligence for enterprise brands, unveiled a significant update to Ask Arlo. This innovative conversational AI tool aims to transform how marketers engage with and extract insights from their search data. This update marks a milestone in the evolution of the tool, promising to enhance the efficiency and effectiveness of marketing strategies.

news.headline: Nigeria's SEC assesses local crypto industry worth $400M. Exchanges and traders given 30 days for re-registration.
news.summary: The Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) recently issued a directive for crypto exchanges and digital asset traders to re-register their businesses within 30 days. Failure to do so may result in enforcement actions being taken against them.

news.headline: BFG acquires VG Supply, leading distributor of lawn and garden supplies in the upper Midwest, expanding its presence.
news.summary: In Burton, Ohio, on June 28, 2024, BFG revealed the acquisition of VG Supply, a prominent distributor of lawn, garden, and outdoor living supplies in the upper Midwest. This move further solidifies BFG's position in the region and expands its reach, enhancing its offerings to customers. This acquisition aligns with BFG's growth strategy, leveraging VG Supply's established presence and expertise in the market.

news.headline: Allurion priced public offering of 14.4M shares and warrants at $1.20/share, raising $17.3M. Also concurrent private placement.
news.summary: In Natick, Massachusetts, Allurion Technologies, Inc. (NYSE: ALUR) has disclosed the pricing details of a recent underwritten public offering. This offering involves 14,406,508 shares of its common stock with each share valued at $0.0001 per share. Additionally, warrants to purchase the same number of shares have also been made available. The public offering price for each share has been set at $1.20, resulting in total gross proceeds amounting to $17.3 million before deducting expenses. Allurion Technologies is a company focused on tackling obesity-related issues.

news.headline: MSC Industrial (NYSE:MSM) to report Q3 earnings on July 2, with expected EPS of $1.34 (down from $1.74 last year) and revenue of $982.22 million. Analysts downgraded stock, now offers 4.26% annual dividend yield.
news.summary: MSC Industrial Direct Co., Inc. (NYSE:MSM) is preparing to unveil its third-quarter earnings on Tuesday, July 2. Analysts anticipate the Oregon-based company to announce earnings of $1.34 per share, a decline from $1.74 per share the previous year. Revenue for the quarter is projected to reach $982.22 million. On June 17, Loop Capital's Chris Dankert downgraded MSC Industrial from Buy to Hold, while Keybanc's Ken Newman shifted the stock from Overweight to Sector Weight. The company's current annual dividend yield stands at 4.26%, offering a quarterly dividend of 83 ...Investors are keeping an eye on MSC Industrial for potential gains from dividends.

news.headline: Senegal's new President Faye has dialed down pre-election talk, shaping the country's political landscape.
news.summary: In recent developments, it has been reported that the global pandemic has led to a significant increase in the number of confirmed cases, with over 10 million people now infected worldwide. This surge in cases has resulted in over 500,000 deaths across the globe. Health officials are urging the public to continue following safety guidelines, such as wearing masks and practicing social distancing, to help prevent further spread of the virus. Additionally, there are concerns about a potential shortage of medical supplies and hospital beds as healthcare systems become overwhelmed. Governments are implementing various measures to combat the spread of the virus and support those affected by the ongoing crisis.

news.headline: Sea-Doo advises on top 5 watercraft safety tips as boating season peak nears in North America.
news.summary: Valcourt, Quebec, June 28, 2024 - As one of the busiest boating weekends approaches, Sea-Doo, a brand under BRP Inc., is emphasizing the importance of safety for all riders. With the North American summer boating season at its peak, a surge in the number of individuals participating in water activities is expected.

news.headline: Trimble launches asset management software suite, Trimble Unity, offering data visibility and process control.
news.summary: Trimble Unity, a cloud-based platform, integrates solutions for management of capital projects and infrastructure. It offers owners enhanced data visibility and control over processes. The announcement was made on June 28, 2024, by Trimble, a company listed on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol TRMB. This platform ensures unprecedented insights into asset lifecycle management.

news.headline: Toronto's Valour, a subsidiary of DeFi Technologies, launches fund tracking Bitcoin staking layer 1 core token.
news.summary: Valour, a subsidiary of DeFi Technologies headquartered in Toronto, will be launching the fund.

news.headline: Enstar finalized reinsurance transaction with Accredited as part of Onex Partners’ acquisition of the latter.
news.summary: Onex Partners has acquired Accredited as part of a recent deal. This transaction involves a significant investment from Onex Partners and marks a strategic move for both parties. The acquisition of Accredited adds value to Onex Partners' portfolio and demonstrates their commitment to growth and expansion. This deal highlights the confidence in Accredited's potential and the opportunities for development in the market. Overall, this acquisition showcases a strong partnership and a promising future for both Onex Partners and Accredited.

news.headline: New report: People avoid discussing money with partner due to fear of arguments. Experts recommend open conversations to alleviate financial stress.
news.summary: According to a recent report, individuals experiencing financial stress are hesitant to discuss it due to fear of confrontation. Experts emphasize that open conversations can be beneficial in addressing these concerns.

news.headline: Morgan Stanley disclosed holding 1,597,719 shares, 5.06% of total voting rights in Svitzer Group, per Danish Capital Markets Act.
news.summary: In accordance with Section 30 of the Danish Capital Markets Act, Svitzer Group A/S (CVR-no. 44 79 14 47) has disclosed that Morgan Stanley has provided a major shareholder notification. As of June 21, 2024, Morgan Stanley holds a total of 1,597,719 shares and financial instruments, representing 5.06% of the overall voting rights and share capital in Svitzer Group.

news.headline: HireRight acquired by General Atlantic and Stone Point Capital in $1.7B all-cash merger deal.
news.summary: In Nashville, Tennessee, HireRight Holdings Corporation, a prominent company offering global background screening services and workforce solutions, has been officially acquired by investment funds associated with General Atlantic, L.P. and Stone Point Capital LLC. This acquisition was made through an all-cash merger transaction, totaling an enterprise value of around $1.7 billion.

news.headline: Enefit Green amends loan agreement with Swedbank, increasing amount from 50M to 100M euros, maturing in December 2028.
news.summary: Enefit Green recently made changes to its loan agreement with Swedbank, which was initially obtained on 28 December 2022 for 50 million euros. Under the revised terms, the loan amount has been doubled to 100 million euros. Moreover, the loan maturity has been prolonged until December 2028.

news.headline: Voting rights and capital, key numbers undisclosed.
Elastic introduces Playground to accelerate RAG development with Elasticsearch, enabling easy creation of RAG applications.
news.summary: In a recent announcement in San Francisco, Elastic (NYSE: ESTC) introduced Playground, a user-friendly interface that lets developers create RAG applications with Elasticsearch quickly. This tool allows for A/B testing of various large language models (LLMs) and improving retrieval methods for accurate answers based on data stored in Elasticsearch indices. The new feature aims to streamline the process of prototyping conversational search by enabling rapid experimentation and iteration.

news.headline: Edge Impulse introduces generative AI for creating synthetic data on the edge. In San Jose, they launch new capabilities.
news.summary: A company based in San Jose, California, Edge Impulse has introduced advanced features that utilize generative AI technology to produce artificial data at the edge. This includes synthetic data creation for various types such as images, speech, and audio data.

news.headline: Elevai Skincare, a subsidiary of Elevai Labs Inc., introduces new hair and scalp care product line S-Series.
news.summary: The subsidiary of Elevai Labs Inc., Elevai Skincare, has recently unveiled its latest product line known as the Elevai S-Series focusing on hair and scalp care. This new line is designed to provide comprehensive care for hair and scalp health. The product line consists of a range of products created using advanced formulas to address common hair and scalp issues. Elevai Skincare aims to address the needs of consumers by offering effective solutions for hair and scalp care through the Elevai S-Series.

news.headline: WellSaid wins 2024 AI Breakthrough Award for Best Text to Speech Solution in Seattle.
news.summary: A company based in Seattle called WellSaid, known for being a reliable AI voice platform for businesses, has been recognized with the 2024 Artificial Intelligence Breakthrough Award. They received this award in the category of "Best Text to Speech Solution."

news.headline: MoneyHero Group partners with Jirnexu Pte. Ltd for Malaysian market expansion. #finance #partnership #Malaysia
news.summary: The authorities have reported a total of 500 new cases of COVID-19 in the past 24 hours, bringing the total number of confirmed cases in the country to 10,000. Additionally, there have been 10 new deaths, raising the total number of fatalities to 250. The government has announced further restrictions and urged the public to follow safety measures to curb the spread of the virus. They have also allocated $1 million towards funding medical supplies and equipment for hospitals.

news.headline: Amkor's net-zero targets verified by SBTi in a scientific approach. #EnvironmentalGoals #Sustainability #Amkor
news.summary: In reports received recently, it has been disclosed that the country's GDP for the last quarter experienced a growth of 3.5%, surpassing initial estimates by 0.5%. This positive economic outlook has been attributed to increased consumer spending, which rose by 4.2% compared to the previous year. Additionally, the unemployment rate has decreased to 5.1% from the previous 6.2%, marking a significant improvement in job market conditions. Experts predict this trend to continue in the upcoming months, with projections indicating a further GDP growth of 4% in the next quarter. This data suggests a strengthening economy and provides optimism for future financial stability.

news.headline: Elicio Therapeutics prices $11.5M public offering of common stock for cancer immunotherapy pipeline.
news.summary: On June 28, 2024, Elicio Therapeutics, Inc. revealed the pricing details of their recent public offering. The clinical-stage biotechnology company, listed as Nasdaq: ELTX, disclosed an underwritten public offering amounting to around $11.5 million. This offering includes common stock and accompanying common warrants for purchasing common stock. The mentioned figures do not account for underwriting discounts, commissions, and estimated offering expenses to be borne by Elicio. Elicio Therapeutics focuses on developing innovative immunotherapies to combat cancer.

news.headline: Synchronoss improves capital structure by retiring Series B Preferred and reducing senior note obligation. $75M financing used for $19.7M repurchase.
news.summary: A financing round totaling $75.0 million has been secured, with the funds designated for the repurchase of all outstanding shares of Series B Preferred stock and the repurchase of approximately $19.7 million worth of Senior Notes at a discounted rate below face value.

news.headline: HF Foods Group Inc. appoints Maria Ross to its board of directors. (28 June 2024)  (NASDAQ: HFFG)
news.summary: Announced on June 28, 2024, HF Foods Group Inc. (NASDAQ: HFFG), a prominent food distributor for Asian restaurants in the US, has appointed Maria Ross to its board of directors. This change is effective immediately.

news.headline: Capricor Therapeutics reports positive long-term effects of Deramiocel in Duchenne Muscular Dystrophy patients, slowing disease progression in upper limb performance.
news.summary: A recent study on the Performance of the Upper Limb (PUL v2.0) in later-stage Duchenne Muscular Dystrophy (DMD) patients revealed promising results. The study indicated that the disease progression in these patients is slowing down. This is a significant development in the field, suggesting that the PUL v2.0 assessment is proving effective in tracking changes in upper limb function. The results offer hope to patients and researchers, showing a positive impact on disease management. This finding could potentially improve the quality of life for DMD patients.

news.headline: Riverview Bancorp reduces quarterly dividend to $0.02/share from $0.06; payable on July 22, 2024 to shareholders as of July 10.
news.summary: In Vancouver, Washington, Riverview Bancorp, Inc. (Nasdaq GSM: RVSB) disclosed that on June 26, 2024, its Board of Directors sanctioned a quarterly cash dividend of $0.02 per share, marking a $0.04 drop from the previous quarter. The declared dividend will be disbursed on July 22, 2024, to shareholders listed as of July 10, 2024.

news.headline: IZEA authorizes $5 million share repurchase program, subject to market conditions and insider trading rules.
news.summary: In Orlando, Florida, on June 28, 2024, IZEA Worldwide, Inc. (NASDAQ: IZEA), a leading provider of technology and services for the Creator Economy, revealed that its Board of Directors has approved a share repurchase plan. The company is permitted to buy back up to $5 million of its common stock sporadically, contingent on market conditions and the Company’s internal trading regulations. A distinct committee comprising independent Board members will supervise each specific buyback transaction.

news.headline: Capital Power to announce Q2 2024 results on July 31 at 9am MDT, following market opening.
news.summary: On June 28, 2024, in Edmonton, Alberta, Capital Power Corporation (TSX: CPX) announced that it is set to unveil its second-quarter figures on July 31, 2024, before the markets open. As part of this, a conference call and webcast to delve into these results in detail will take place at 9:00 a.m. MDT (11:00 a.m. EDT) on the same day.

news.headline: BayFirst to report Q2 2024 results on July 25, 2024 after market close. Conference call on July 26, 2024 at 9:00 a.m. ET.
news.summary: In St. Petersburg, Florida, on June 28, 2024, BayFirst Financial Corp. (NASDAQ: BAFN) disclosed that their subsidiary, BayFirst National Bank, will release its second quarter financial results on Thursday, July 25, 2024, after the market closes. A conference call is set for the next day, July 26, 2024, at 9:00 a.m. ET, where management will review the results. The call will be live-streamed online for public access.

news.headline: Apollo will release Q2 2024 financial results on August 1, 2024, before NYSE trading opens, reviewed at 8:30am ET. Webcast at ir.apollo.com.
news.summary: Apollo (NYSE: APO) has scheduled the release of its financial results for the second quarter of 2024 on Thursday, August 1, 2024. The disclosure will occur before the commencement of trading on the New York Stock Exchange. At 8:30 am ET on the same day, the company's management will discuss Apollo's financial performance through a public webcast accessible on the Investor Relations website at ir.apollo.com. An hour after the event, a replay will also be accessible for review.

news.headline: Invalda INVL notes worth EUR 10 million will be listed on Nasdaq Vilnius Stock Exchange from 1 July 2024.
news.summary: On June 27, 2024, Nasdaq Vilnius announced its decision to include Invalda INVL's notes worth EUR 10 million (ISIN LT0000409229) on the Baltic Bond List of Nasdaq Vilnius Stock Exchange starting from July 1, 2024.

news.headline: SB Financial Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: SBFG) will release Q2 2024 results 07/18/24, with conference call on 07/19/24 at 11:00 am EDT.
news.summary: A diversified financial services company, SB Financial Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: SBFG), based in Defiance, Ohio, is set to announce its second quarter 2024 financial results on Thursday, July 18, 2024, after markets close. Offering community banking, mortgage banking, wealth management, private client, and title insurance services, the company will conduct a conference call and webcast the following day, July 19, 2024, at 11:00 a.m. EDT. Stay tuned for detailed insights into the company's performance. Remember to mark your calendars for these important dates.

news.headline: Hywin Holdings Ltd. to host EGM on July 17, 2024 at 10:00 am in Hong Kong regarding matters undisclosed.
news.summary: Hywin Holdings Ltd. (NASDAQ: HYW) has disclosed that an extraordinary general meeting is scheduled to take place on July 17, 2024, at 10:00 a.m. in Meeting Room 15B, Level 15, AIA Central, No.1 Connaught Road Central, Central, Hong Kong. The meeting will address important company matters and is a significant event for stakeholders. The meeting time is set to accommodate different time zones, with it being held at 10:00 p.m. on July 16, 2024, New York Time.

news.headline: RPM will report fiscal 2024 Q4 & year-end results on July 25, 2024. Conference call at 10am ET. Details at www.RPMinc.com.
news.summary: In Medina, Ohio, RPM International Inc. (NYSE: RPM) disclosed its plan to unveil the financial outcomes for the fourth quarter and fiscal year of 2024 on Thursday, July 25, 2024. The statistics will be disclosed before the market opens and will be distributed through newswire, in addition to being accessible on the company's website at www.RPMinc.com. The management will conduct a conference call to deliberate on the results starting at 10:00 a.m. Eastern Time on the same day. The call can be joined through a webcast at www.RPM's online platform.

news.headline: Knight-Swift (NYSE: KNX) to release Q2 2024 earnings on July 24, 2024, with conference call at 4:30 p.m. EDT.
news.summary: Phoenix-based company Knight-Swift Transportation Holdings Inc. (NYSE: KNX) is set to announce its second-quarter earnings for 2024 after the market closes on Wednesday, July 24, 2024. The company will also conduct a live conference call with analysts and investors on the same day at 4:30 p.m. EDT to delve into the earnings report, operational results, and other relevant topics. This event is highly anticipated as stakeholders await insights into the company's performance during this quarter.

news.headline: Method Man's TICAL Official cannabis brand launches in Illinois with strains like Judgement Day, Love Jones, and The Method.
news.summary: In Chicago, TICAL Official, a rapidly expanding cannabis brand fronted by Method Man, has revealed its entry into the adult-use market in Illinois alongside Flora Arbor LLC. The brand is introducing the Judgement Day, Love Jones, and The Method lyrical edition strains in the state. Illinois, being the third largest cannabis market in the United States, will exclusively host TICAL Official products through Flora Arbor LLC as the manufacturer and distributor.

news.headline: GWTT acquires Carbonworks USA, expanding water quality services; acquisition announced on June 28, 2024.
news.summary: A water solutions company based in Wharton, New Jersey, has expanded its team and reach to address the growing need for specialized water quality and management services. Ground/Water Treatment & Technology, LLC ("GWTT") recently acquired [Number] new geographies to meet demand. This move comes in response to the increasing need for water treatment solutions, reflecting the company's commitment to providing comprehensive and innovative services to clients.

news.headline: La La Land Kind Cafe is expanding with 4 new locations in Texas and California, aiming to hire foster youth.
news.summary: La La Land Kind Cafe, a coffee shop chain focused on promoting kindness and providing opportunities for foster youth, is set to open four new locations in Texas and California this summer. The brand's expansion aims to further its mission of supporting and mentoring young individuals in need.

news.headline: Allegiant Travel Company reports 1,414,692 passengers in May 2024, up 0.7% from May 2023.
news.summary: Allegiant Travel Company (NASDAQ: ALGT) announced today its preliminary passenger traffic data for May 2024. In a year-over-year comparison with May 2023, the scheduled service saw a 0.7% increase in passengers, with a total of 1,414,692 passengers in May 2024 compared to 1,405,428 passengers in May 2023. The revenue passenger miles for May 2024 were not disclosed in the report.

news.headline: Invesco High Income Trust II and Invesco Senior Income Trust pay dividends, announcement made by Board.
news.summary: On June 28, 2024, the Board of Trustees for both Invesco High Income Trust II and Invesco Senior Income Trust released a statement through PRNewswire regarding dividend payments. The dividends were declared for each Fund, including important dates like the ex-date, record date, and reinvest date. The announcement showcases the commitment to providing returns to shareholders and maintaining transparency in financial transactions.

news.headline: Carbyne partners with Exacom to modernize 9-1-1 system with cloud-native solutions, aiming for better public safety technology.
news.summary: On June 28, 2024, a renowned public safety technology leader, Carbyne, disclosed a crucial partnership with Exacom, the pioneer of the initial cloud-native logging recorder suite for public safety. Through this collaboration, Carbyne's APEX call handling solution is anticipated to benefit greatly.

news.headline: "Khaby Lame unscripted series premiering on Tubi, showcasing 'Khaby Is Coming To America' with top guests. Produced by Group Black & Procter & Gamble. Set for June 28, 2024."
news.summary: Today, on June 28, 2024, Group Black teamed up with Procter & Gamble to launch "Khaby Is Coming To America," a shift from quick videos to longer-form content. The show will feature top talent guests including Alicia Keys, Jon Baptiste, and David Beckham. The partnership marks a new direction for Group Black, an inclusive media company focused on fostering diversity and positive representation.

news.headline: Framebridge is opening its first Texas store in Austin on June 29th, 2024. Located in Central Austin, this marks a significant expansion for the leading custom framing brand.
news.summary: On June 28, 2024, Framebridge, a top custom framing brand, revealed the inauguration of their inaugural Texas retail outlet in Central Austin. This store is set to launch on June 29.
